metadata.title: Casa Lolle — Stone Cottage in Tuscany
metadata.description: A beautifully restored stone cottage with private pool and panoramic mountain views in the Tuscan hills. 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4.

hero.title: Casa Lolle
hero.subtitle: A restored stone cottage in the Tuscan hills
hero.location: Fabbriche di Casabasciana, Bagni di Lucca, Tuscany

intro.text: Nestled on a mountainside just 5 km from the charming Bagni di Lucca, Casa Lolle is a beautifully restored stone cottage surrounded by nature, with a private pool and panoramic mountain views.

living.title: The Living Space
living.text: Floor-to-ceiling glass walls frame the mountain views and look out over the pool. A wood-burning stove keeps things cosy on cooler evenings.

bedroom.title: The Bedrooms
bedroom.text: Two bedrooms with panoramic mountain views. Air-conditioning and quality linens included.

kitchen.title: The Kitchen
kitchen.text: Original stone walls, exposed beams. Fully equipped with oven, dishwasher and dining for four.

pool.title: The Pool
pool.text: Your private pool with mountain views. Sun loungers and parasols included.

calendar.title: Availability
calendar.subtitle: Check when Casa Lolle is available
calendar.minStay: Minimum stay: 1 night (may vary by season)

location.title: Getting There
location.address: Fabbriche di Casabasciana, Bagni di Lucca

distances.station: 9 km from Bagni di Lucca train station (trains to Florence, Pisa & the coast)

thingsToDo.title: Things To Do
thingsToDo.subtitle: Explore Tuscany from your doorstep

beaches.title: Beaches
beaches.text: Viareggio, Forte dei Marmi & the Pisa coast

adventure.title: Adventure
adventure.text: Canyon Park (4 km), canyoning, rafting, SUP, mountain biking

culture.title: Culture
culture.text: Lucca (33 km), Florence, Pisa — museums, historic walls, Lucca Summer Festival (July)

dining.title: Local Dining
dining.text: Villa Aurora, 2 bars/trattorias & a local salumi shop in the village

thingsToDo.nearby: Also nearby: Prato Fiorito (7 km), Orrido di Botri (19 km), Grotta del Vento (34 km), Marlia Villa Reale (26 km)
